# Project instructions for Claude

**Generated by:** Claude Sonnet 4.6 (`claude-sonnet-4-6`)
**Tokens used for this revision (measured):** ~1,337,800 — covers this
revision together with the `BUILD-LOG.md` and `DECISION-LOG.md` edits made
in the same response

## Document headers (every file Claude creates or edits)

Every markdown document in this project — newly created, or edited in a way
that adds substantive content — should carry near the top:

```
**Generated by:** Claude <model name> (`<model-id>`)
**Tokens used for this revision (measured):** <figure>
```

(For a living/journal-style document like `BUILD-LOG.md`, use "Last updated
by" instead of "Generated by".)

- **Measure, don't estimate.** Pull the figure from this session's transcript
  at `~/.claude/projects/<encoded-cwd>/<session-id>.jsonl`: for each line with
  a `message.usage` object, take `cache_creation_input_tokens +
  cache_read_input_tokens + output_tokens`, **dedupe consecutive lines with
  identical (cache_creation, cache_read, output) tuples** (one API call can
  emit several log lines), and sum across the calls covering the work.
- If one response produces/edits multiple documents, the same combined figure
  may be reported in each, with a one-line note that it covers the combined
  work.
- **No cost figure** unless explicitly asked.
- `DECISION-LOG.md` and `team-review-summary.md` were finalized before this
  convention existed and were not retroactively updated.

## Claude model recommendation

Default to **Claude Sonnet 4.6** for this build (implementation work: Kotlin/
Compose code, persistence, JUnit/Compose UI tests). Consider switching to
**Opus** (via the `/fast` toggle) for: foundational data-model decisions
(Step B of `build-plan-hardened.md`), or if stuck debugging after 2-3 fix
attempts. See `test-plan.md` for the full reasoning.

## Model recommendation in prompt documents

Any document framed as "a prompt to paste into Claude Code" (or another AI
coding tool) — e.g. `build-plan-hardened.md` — must include a short
**"Recommended Claude model to run this"** callout near the top: which model
to use for the work that prompt describes, plus a one-line reason or a
pointer to fuller reasoning (e.g. `test-plan.md`). Apply this to every future
prompt-style document, not just this one.

**This is informational, not self-executing** — a pasted prompt cannot
change which model is running. The callout must give the PM the exact
command to switch themselves (e.g. `/model claude-opus-4-8`, `/model
claude-sonnet-4-6`, or the `/fast` toggle), including switching back when the
recommendation reverts to the default model.

## Where decisions get recorded

Stage-2-review-style PM decisions (options considered, PM rationale, final
call, tokens/cost) belong in `DECISION-LOG.md`, in full detail — including
addenda for decisions made after the original "FINALIZED" status (numbered
sequentially, e.g. "Addendum 9"). `BUILD-LOG.md` narrates the overall process
and should summarize and point to `DECISION-LOG.md` rather than restating
decision detail — if a decision's full options/rationale aren't already in
`DECISION-LOG.md`, add them there (not to `BUILD-LOG.md`).

## Testing approach

Before pausing for the PM to test anything, write and run the relevant
automated tests (JUnit / Compose UI via Gradle) for the step just completed,
and fix any failures. `test-plan.md` lists every test case and marks each
Automated (Claude) or Manual (PM) — only the Manual ones should be handed to
the PM, with exact steps.
